common.tagline: 5-star hotels and Palaces in France — editorial selection and premium booking

homepage.title: The concierge for France's finest hotels
homepage.subtitle: IATA-accredited agency and ASPST member. GDS net rates, secure Amadeus payment, loyalty perks from the first night.

consent.title: Your cookie preferences
consent.intro: We use cookies to make this site work (login, booking cart, security). With your consent we also measure usage anonymously to improve it. You can accept, refuse or customise at any time.

essential.name: Essential cookies
essential.description: Strictly necessary for the site to function (session, security, booking cart). Always on, cannot be disabled.

analytics.name: Audience measurement
analytics.description: Anonymised statistics (Vercel Analytics, Web Vitals) to understand how the site is used. No advertising profile.

footer.tagline: Curated 5-star and Palace hotels in France — booking made simple.

noticePage.title: Legal notice
noticePage.metaDescription: ConciergeTravel legal notice — publisher, hosting, intellectual property, travel agency licences.

editor.title: Publisher
editor.body: The conciergetravel.fr website is published by ConciergeTravel, a French SAS with share capital of €10,000, registered with the Paris Trade Register under number RCS XXX XXX XXX, whose registered office is in Paris, France. EU VAT number: FR XX XXXXXXXXX. Publication director: ConciergeTravel management.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Email: contact@conciergetravel.fr. Phone: +33 1 XX XX XX XX. Any enquiry about the site, content or bookings may be sent to this address.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.body: The site is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA. Databases are operated by Supabase Inc. inside the European Union (eu-central-1 region).

license.title: Travel agency licence
license.body: ConciergeTravel operates as a travel agent registered with Atout France under number IM XXXXXXXXX. Financial guarantee: Groupama Assurance-Crédit, 8-10 rue d'Astorg, 75008 Paris. Professional civil liability: HISCOX Europe Underwriting Ltd, 19 rue Louis Le Grand, 75002 Paris.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.body: All site content (texts, photographs, logos, trademarks, databases, design) is protected by copyright and trademark law. Any reproduction, representation, modification or use, in whole or in part, without prior written authorisation is prohibited.

privacyPage.title: Privacy policy
privacyPage.metaDescription: ConciergeTravel privacy policy — personal data, purposes, retention, GDPR rights, DPO contact.

intro.title: Preamble
intro.body: ConciergeTravel takes the protection of personal data seriously. This policy describes the data processing carried out as part of the use of the site and the booking services. It complies with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and French data protection law.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body: ConciergeTravel SAS, located in Paris, France. Data Protection Officer (DPO): dpo@conciergetravel.fr.

purposes.title: Purposes and legal bases
items: Booking management (contract performance): identity, contact, stay, payment.
Loyalty tracking (legitimate interest): number of stays, Free/Premium tier.
Transactional communications (contract performance): confirmations, reminders, post-stay.
Commercial communications (consent): news and selections, opt-in.
Security and fraud prevention (legitimate interest): logs, anti-bot, idempotency.
Anonymised audience measurement (consent): Vercel Analytics, Web Vitals.

retention.title: Retention periods
items: Account data: throughout the life of the account, deleted within 30 days after closure.
Booking data: 10 years (accounting and tax obligations).
Connection and security logs: 12 months maximum.

recipients.title: Recipients
recipients.body: Your data is accessible to ConciergeTravel operational teams and to our strictly necessary sub-processors: Supabase (database hosting), Vercel (application hosting), Amadeus (booking and payment), Brevo (email), Algolia (search), Upstash (cache). No data is sold or rented to third parties for commercial purposes.

transfers.title: International transfers
transfers.body: Some sub-processors may process data from the United States. These transfers are governed by the Standard Contractual Clauses adopted by the European Commission and, where required, by additional safeguards.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, object, port and to define post-mortem instructions. To exercise your rights: dpo@conciergetravel.fr. You may also lodge a complaint with the CNIL (www.cnil.fr).

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: Cookie usage is detailed in our Cookie policy. You can change your choices at any time via the "Manage cookies" link in the footer.

termsPage.title: Terms of sale
termsPage.metaDescription: ConciergeTravel terms of sale — hotel reservation, payment, cancellation, jurisdiction.

scope.title: Scope
scope.body: These Terms of Sale govern bookings made by any customer ("the Customer") via conciergetravel.fr with ConciergeTravel ("the Agency"). Any booking implies full and unreserved acceptance of these Terms.

reservation.title: Booking process
reservation.body: A booking is concluded upon the written confirmation sent by the Agency (confirmation email bearing the reference CT-…). Before this confirmation, the displayed offer is indicative and may vary until the rate is locked.

price.title: Prices and payment
price.body: Prices are quoted in euros, taxes included (TTC). Payment is processed via the secure Amadeus Payments solution (PCI DSS, 3-D Secure). The Agency does not have access to the Customer's card data.

cancellation.title: Cancellation and changes
cancellation.body: Cancellation and modification conditions are those displayed at booking time and specific to each offer. Article L221-28 12° of the French Consumer Code explicitly excludes accommodation services from the right of withdrawal. Cancellation requests must be sent by email to reservations@conciergetravel.fr.

liability.title: Liability
liability.body: The Agency acts as an intermediary between the Customer and the hotel. Its liability cannot be engaged for breaches attributable to the hotel, force majeure or the Customer's own act. Professional civil liability is covered by HISCOX Europe Underwriting Ltd.

loyalty.title: Loyalty programme
loyalty.body: Loyalty programme benefits (Free, Premium) are described on the site and apply subject to the property's eligibility. Benefits are non-transferable and non-redeemable for cash.

law.title: Governing law and jurisdiction
law.body: These Terms are governed by French law. Failing an amicable settlement and after recourse to a consumer mediator, any dispute will fall within the jurisdiction of the courts of Paris.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie policy
cookiesPage.metaDescription: ConciergeTravel cookie policy — categories, purposes, retention, preference management.

intro.title: What is a cookie?
intro.body: A cookie is a small file placed on your device when you visit a site. It stores useful information (preferences, authentication, audience measurement). The conciergetravel.fr site uses only cookies strictly necessary for its operation, plus anonymised audience-measurement cookies that we place only with your consent.

categories.title: Categories used
categories.intro: You can accept or refuse each category from the consent banner. Your choices are kept for a maximum of 13 months in line with the CNIL recommendation.
categories.essential: Essential cookies (always on): session, security, booking cart, storage of consent preferences.
categories.analytics: Audience measurement (with consent): anonymised visit statistics (Vercel Analytics, Web Vitals).

manage.title: Manage your preferences
manage.body: You can change your choices at any time via the "Manage cookies" link in the footer, or through your browser settings. Refusing essential cookies is not technically possible: they are required to deliver the service.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any question about this policy: dpo@conciergetravel.fr.

priceComparator.title: Price comparison

scenario.cheaper: Best price observed for this stay.

priceComparator.legal: Prices observed for informational purposes only, subject to change. All rates are shown taxes included.
